name: x-create
description: Create viral X (Twitter) posts including short tweets, threads, and replies. Use when user wants to write X content, create posts, or mentions "create tweet", "write thread", "x-create", "写推文", "创作推文". Supports 5 post styles with customizable templates. First-time users go through onboarding to set up profile.
capabilities: Generate short tweets under 280 characters with high engagement potential
Create multi-tweet threads (3-10 tweets) with sequential storytelling
Write reply posts for trending topics using your established style
Apply 5 proven post patterns: high-value, sharp opinion, trending comment, story insight, and tech analysis
Learn your writing style from reference posts for consistent voice
Suggest optimal posting times and engagement predictions
author: kangarooking
securitySummary: All 75 static findings are false positives. The scanner misinterpreted markdown code blocks (triple backticks) as shell execution and mixed-language documentation as obfuscation. No actual external commands, cryptographic code, or malicious patterns exist in this X post creation skill.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to consistently produce engaging social media posts. This skill generates viral X (Twitter) content including short tweets, multi-tweet threads, and replies using proven patterns tailored to your personal style.
userTitle: Create Viral X Posts and Threads
limitations: Does not actually post to X - generates content for you to publish manually
Does not access trending topics or current news feeds
Requires initial onboarding to understand your preferences
May not capture very niche or highly technical vocabulary specific to your field

useCases.targetUser: Social media managers and content creators
useCases.title: Content Creator Workflow
useCases.description: Generate consistent, on-brand content for your X audience using proven viral patterns adapted to your style.

useCases.targetUser: Thought leaders and subject matter experts
useCases.title: Thread Writing Assistant
useCases.description: Break down complex topics into structured, engaging multi-tweet threads that drive followers and engagement.

useCases.title: Quick Post Generation
useCases.description: Create rapid-response posts for trending topics or news events while maintaining your authentic voice.

promptTemplates.title: Simple Short Tweet
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a short tweet (under 280 characters) about [topic]. Use my [professional/casual/sharp] style. Make it engaging with a clear call to action or question.

promptTemplates.title: Topic Thread
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a 5-part thread about [topic]. Each tweet should be under 280 characters. Start with a hook, provide 3 key points, include data or examples, and end with a question. My audience is [description].
promptTemplates.scenario: Multi-tweet thread on a specific topic

promptTemplates.title: Trending Reply
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a reply to this trending post: [post content]. My style is [description]. Add value with an insightful comment that encourages engagement.

promptTemplates.title: Style Transfer
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a [high-value/sharp-opinion/trending-comment/story-insight/tech-analysis] post about [topic]. Reference my style from my saved examples. Include specific patterns that made my best posts successful.

bestPractices: Provide reference posts from accounts you admire so the skill can learn your preferred tone and structure
Complete the initial onboarding with accurate details about your target audience and content goals
Iterate on outputs - refine topics and adjust style preferences for better results over time
antiPatterns: Do not expect the skill to know current events or trending topics - provide context yourself
Avoid leaving onboarding incomplete - the skill needs your profile to generate relevant content
Do not rely on this for real-time news commentary without providing the news context first

faq.question: Does x-create actually post to my X account?
faq.answer: No. x-create generates content for you to review and publish. It does not have access to the X API for posting.

faq.question: How does the skill learn my writing style?
faq.answer: Place example posts you like in assets/templates/{category}/ folder. The skill reads these to understand your preferred tone, structure, and vocabulary.

faq.question: What are the 5 post types supported?
faq.answer: High-value (educational), Sharp opinion (controversial takes), Trending comment (news response), Story insight (personal experience), and Tech analysis (deep dives).

faq.question: Can I use this skill for languages other than English?
faq.answer: Yes. Set your preferred language during onboarding. The skill works with Chinese, English, or bilingual content.

faq.question: How long should my thread be?
faq.answer: Threads typically range from 3 to 10 tweets. Shorter threads (3-5) work for quick tips. Longer threads (6-10) suit detailed analyses.

faq.question: What if I do not have reference posts to share?
faq.answer: The skill includes default patterns in references/post-patterns.md. These are proven viral templates you can use directly.
